title: Local Variable Type Inference with Inheritance
description: A flowchart demonstrating how the 'var' keyword infers the compile-time type of an object created via inheritance, and the subsequent method resolution.
elements: Code declaring a variable with 'var' and 'new'
Compiler infers declared type from initializer
Object of subclass type created in memory
JVM resolves method based on actual runtime object type
relationships: Inferred type determines available methods at compile time
Actual object type determines method execution at runtime
